title: Iran says funeral for late Supreme Leader Khamenei to begin July 4, burial set for July 9

snapshot.title: Iran says funeral for late Supreme Leader Khamenei to begin July 4, burial set for July 9
snapshot.description: DUBAI: Funeral for Iran's ​late Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei will begin in Tehran on July ‌4 and ‌conclude with ​his ‌burial ⁠in ​the northeastern ⁠city of Mashhad on July 9, state media reported ⁠on Saturday. Khamenei, ‌was ‌killed ​in ‌Israeli and ‌U.S. strikes on Iran in February. His death ‌marked the end of more ⁠than ⁠three decades at the helm of the Islamic Republic.
snapshot.author: Reuters
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran says funeral for late Supreme Leader Khamenei to begin July 4, burial set for July 9 | Arab News
